spec.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes['tool.name'] AS ses, avg(Value) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_sum" WHERE (Attributes['tool.name'] != '' ) AND ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.tool.calls' ) GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes['tool.name'] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND (Attributes['tool.name'] != '' ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.tool.duration' ) 
GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count), MetricName  FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND 
( MetricName = 'openclaw.context.history_tool_size')

 GROUP BY  ses, MetricName, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.tool.duration' ) AND ( Attributes['tool.name'] = 'sessions_spawn' ) 
GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND (Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] != '' ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.context.preparation_duration' ) GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count) AS score FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND (Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] != '' ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.agent.novelty_score' ) GROUP BY ses, time  ORDER BY time ASC  LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND (Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] != '' )  
AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.agent.downstream_context_sharing' ) GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

spec.title: Session Parallelisation and Efficiency Score - smoothed

spec.rawSql:
SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes['openclaw.session.key'] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.session.parallelisation_score' )
GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT
  $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time,
  ses,
  sum(delta_sum) / sum(delta_count) AS value

FROM
(
  SELECT
    TimeUnix,
    Attributes['openclaw.session.key'] AS ses,

    greatest(
      Sum - lagInFrame(Sum)
        OVER (
          PARTITION BY Attributes['openclaw.session.key']
          ORDER BY TimeUnix
        ),
      0
    ) AS delta_sum,

    greatest(
      Count - lagInFrame(Count)
        OVER (
          PARTITION BY Attributes['openclaw.session.key']
          ORDER BY TimeUnix
        ),
      0
    ) AS delta_count

  FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram"

  WHERE TimeUnix >= $__fromTime
    AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime
    AND MetricName = 'openclaw.session.repetition_score'
)

WHERE delta_count > 0

GROUP BY
  ses,
  time

ORDER BY
  time ASC,
  ses ASC

LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, avg(Value) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_sum" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND (Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] != '' ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.memory.search_hit' ) GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes['tool.name'] AS ses, avg(Value) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_sum" WHERE (Attributes['tool.name'] != '' ) AND ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.tool.errors' ) GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, avg(Value) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_sum" 
WHERE (Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] != '' ) AND ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND
( MetricName = 'openclaw.memory.write_events' ) GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, avg(Value) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_sum" 
WHERE (Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] != '' ) AND ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND
( MetricName = 'openclaw.memory.read_events' ) GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count), MetricName  FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND 
( MetricName = 'openclaw.context.history_user_size')

 GROUP BY  ses, MetricName, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count), MetricName  FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND 
(MetricName = 'openclaw.context.history_other_size')

 GROUP BY  ses, MetricName, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count), MetricName  FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND 
( MetricName = 'openclaw.context.prompt_size')

 GROUP BY  ses, MetricName, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count), MetricName  FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND

WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND

 GROUP BY  ses, MetricName, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses, avg(Value) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_sum" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND (Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] != '' ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.memory.search_miss' ) 
GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT
  $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time,
  ses,
  sum(delta_sum) / sum(delta_count) AS value

FROM
(
  SELECT
    TimeUnix,
    Attributes['openclaw.session.key'] AS ses,

    greatest(
      Sum - lagInFrame(Sum)
        OVER (
          PARTITION BY Attributes['openclaw.session.key']
          ORDER BY TimeUnix
        ),
      0
    ) AS delta_sum,

    greatest(
      Count - lagInFrame(Count)
        OVER (
          PARTITION BY Attributes['openclaw.session.key']
          ORDER BY TimeUnix
        ),
      0
    ) AS delta_count

  FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram"

  WHERE TimeUnix >= $__fromTime
    AND TimeUnix <= $__toTime
    AND MetricName = 'openclaw.session.parallelisation_score'
)

WHERE delta_count > 0

GROUP BY
  ses,
  time

ORDER BY
  time ASC,
  ses ASC

LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes['openclaw.session.key'] AS ses, sum(Sum)/sum(Count) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.session.repetition_score' )
GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

SELECT
  $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time,

FROM
(
  SELECT
    TimeUnix,
    Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] AS ses,

    greatest(
      Sum - lagInFrame(Sum)
        OVER (

          ORDER BY TimeUnix
        ),
      0
    ) AS delta_sum,

    greatest(

        OVER (

          ORDER BY TimeUnix

  FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram"

WHERE delta_count > 0

LIMIT 1000

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) as "time", Attributes['gen_ai.agent.id'] AS ses, max(Count) FROM "otel"."otel_metrics_histogram" 
WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.agent.turn_duration' )
GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000

 WHERE ( time >= $__fromTime AND time <= $__toTime ) AND (Attributes[${groupby:singlequote}] != '' ) AND ( MetricName = 'openclaw.memory.search_fragmentation' ) GROUP BY ses, time ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 1000
